farm is considered illiquid as swapping in & out will incur slippage.","errors":{"EnforcedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is paused."}],"ExpectedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is not paused."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC-20 token failed."}]},"events":{"Paused(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`."},"Unpaused(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`."}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"assets()":{"details":"Note that the assets() function includes the current balance of assetTokens, this is because deposit()s and withdraw()als in this farm are handled asynchronously, as they have to go through swaps which calldata has to be generated offchain. This farm therefore holds its reserve in 2 tokens, assetToken and wrapToken."},"paused()":{"details":"Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise."},"setCore(address)":{"params":{"newCore":"to reference"}},"unwrapAssets(uint256,address,bytes)":{"details":"The transaction may be submitted privately to avoid sandwiching, and the function can be called multiple times with partial amounts to help reduce slippage."},"withdraw(uint256,address)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of assets to withdraw","to":"Address to receive the withdrawn assets"}},"wrapAssets(uint256,address,bytes)":{"details":"The transaction may be submitted privately to avoid sandwiching, and the function can be called multiple times with partial amounts to help reduce slippage.The caller is trusted to not be sandwiching the swap to steal yield."}},"stateVariables":{"duration":{"details":"This can be set to 0, treating the farm as a liquid farm, however there will be slippage to swap in & out of the farm, which acts as some kind of entrance & exit fees. Consider setting a duration that is at least long enough to earn yield that covers the swap fees."}},"title":"Swap Farm","version":1},"userdoc":{"events":{"AssetsUpdated(uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"notice":"emitted when there is a deposit of withdrawal from the farm"},"CoreUpdate(address,address)":{"notice":"emitted when the reference to core is updated"}},"kind":"user","methods":{"_SWAP_COOLDOWN()":{"notice":"cooldown period after a swap before another swap can be performed"},"assetToken()":{"notice":"the asset used by deposits and withdrawals in the farm"},"assets()":{"notice":"Returns the total assets in the farm"},"cap()":{"notice":"cap on the amount of assets that can be deposited into the farm"},"convertToAssets(uint256)":{"notice":"Converts a number of wrapTokens to assetTokens based on oracle rates."},"core()":{"notice":"address of the Core contract referenced"},"emergencyAction((address,uint256,bytes)[])":{"notice":"due to inflexibility of current smart contracts, add this ability to be able to execute arbitrary calldata against arbitrary addresses. callable only by governor"},"enabledRouters(address)":{"notice":"Mapping of routers that can be used to swap assetTokens <-> wrapTokens."},"lastSwap()":{"notice":"timestamp of last swap"},"liquidity()":{"notice":"Current liquidity of the farm is the held assetTokens."},"maturity()":{"notice":"Maturity is virtually set as \"always in the future\" to reflect that there are swap fees to exit the farm. In reality we can always swap out, so maturity should be block.timestamp, but these farms should be treated as illiquid & having a maturity in the future is a good compromise, because we don't want to allocate funds there unless they stay for at least enough time to earn yield that covers the swap fees (that act as some kind of entrance & exit fees)."},"maxDeposit()":{"notice":"Returns the max deposit amount for the underlying protocol"},"maxSlippage()":{"notice":"Max slippage for depositing and witdhrawing assets from the farm."},"pause()":{"notice":"set pausable methods to paused"},"setCap(uint256)":{"notice":"set the deposit cap of the farm"},"setCore(address)":{"notice":"WARNING CALLING THIS FUNCTION CAN POTENTIALLY BRICK A CONTRACT IF CORE IS SET INCORRECTLYset new reference to core only callable by governor"},"setEnabledRouter(address,bool)":{"notice":"Allows governance to manage the whitelist of routers to be used by the keeper with FARM_SWAP_CALLER role."},"setMaxSlippage(uint256)":{"notice":"set the max tolerated slippage for depositing and witdhrawing assets from the farm"},"unpause()":{"notice":"set pausable methods to unpaused"},"unwrapAssets(uint256,address,bytes)":{"notice":"Unwraps wrapTokens to assetTokens."},"withdraw(uint256,address)":{"notice":"withdraw an amount of the asset() from the farm"},"wrapAssets(uint256,address,bytes)":{"notice":"Wraps assetTokens as wrapTokens."},"wrapToken()":{"notice":"Reference to the wrap token (to which assetTokens are swapped)."},"wrapTokenOracle()":{"notice":"Reference to an oracle for the wrap token (for wrapToken <-> assetToken exchange rates)."}},"notice":"This contract is used to deploy assets using a swap router. Funds are deposited in the farm in assetTokens, and are then swapped into and out of wrapTokens. This can be used to swap between USDC assetTokens into yield-bearing USD-denominated tokens (e.g. treasuries, mmfs, etc).","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/integrations/farms/SwapFarm.sol":"SwapFarm"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":400},"remappings":[":@core/=src/core/",":@deployment/=deployment/",":@finance/=src/finance/",":@forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":@funding/=src/funding/",":@gateway/=src/gateway/",":@governance/=src/governance/",":@integrations/=src/integrations/",":@interfaces/=src/interfaces/",":@libraries/=src/libraries/",":@locking/=src/locking/",":@openzeppelin/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":@solmate/=lib/solmate/",":@test/=test/",":@tokens/=src/tokens/",":ds-test/=lib/solmate/lib/ds-test/src/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":solmate/=lib/solmate/src/"]},"sources":{"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/access/AccessControl.sol":{"keccak256":"0xa0e92d42942f4f57c5be50568dac11e9d00c93efcb458026e18d2d9b9b2e7308","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://46326c0bb1e296b67185e81c918e0b40501b8b6386165855df0a3f3c634b6a80","dweb:/ipfs/QmTwyrDYtsxsk6pymJTK94PnEpzsmkpUxFuzEiakDopy4Z"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/access/IAccessControl.sol":{"keccak256":"0xc1c2a7f1563b77050dc6d507db9f4ada5d042c1f6a9ddbffdc49c77cdc0a1606","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://fd54abb96a6156d9a761f6fdad1d3004bc48d2d4fce47f40a3f91a7ae83fc3a1","dweb:/ipfs/QmUrFSGkTDJ7WaZ6qPVVe3Gn5uN2viPb7x7QQ35UX4DofX"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/access/extensions/AccessControlEnumerable.sol":{"keccak256":"0x9e4c7633cf75fad6f1719558c4031217bfc925cf62778eabb7c114cb9a2ac525","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://f90d4223161ed133f2e64ca2f2abcaaa2b4624bc803bd676b3078744a509c322","dweb:/ipfs/QmTzoz1b6UXpUWzF6Tsq7WL4QE7nPz4YgmFT9hK1qH575k"]},"lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/access/extensions/IAccessControlEnumerable.s assets().details: Note that the assets() function includes the current balance of assetTokens, this is because deposit()s and withdraw()als in this farm are handled asynchronously, as they have to go through swaps which calldata has to be generated offchain. This farm therefore holds its reserve in 2 tokens, assetToken and wrapToken.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

unwrapAssets(uint256,address,bytes).details: The transaction may be submitted privately to avoid sandwiching, and the function can be called multiple times with partial amounts to help reduce slippage.

params.to: Address to receive the withdrawn assets

wrapAssets(uint256,address,bytes).details: The transaction may be submitted privately to avoid sandwiching, and the function can be called multiple times with partial amounts to help reduce slippage.The caller is trusted to not be sandwiching the swap to steal yield.

_SWAP_COOLDOWN().notice: cooldown period after a swap before another swap can be performed

assetToken().notice: the asset used by deposits and withdrawals in the farm

assets().notice: Returns the total assets in the farm

cap().notice: cap on the amount of assets that can be deposited into the farm

convertToAssets(uint256).notice: Converts a number of wrapTokens to assetTokens based on oracle rates.

core().notice: address of the Core contract referenced

emergencyAction((address,uint256,bytes)[.notice: due to inflexibility of current smart contracts, add this ability to be able to execute arbitrary calldata against arbitrary addresses. callable only by governor

enabledRouters(address).notice: Mapping of routers that can be used to swap assetTokens <-> wrapTokens.

liquidity().notice: Current liquidity of the farm is the held assetTokens.

maturity().notice: Maturity is virtually set as "always in the future" to reflect that there are swap fees to exit the farm. In reality we can always swap out, so maturity should be block.timestamp, but these farms should be treated as illiquid & having a maturity in the future is a good compromise, because we don't want to allocate funds there unless they stay for at least enough time to earn yield that covers the swap fees (that act as some kind of entrance & exit fees).

maxDeposit().notice: Returns the max deposit amount for the underlying protocol

maxSlippage().notice: Max slippage for depositing and witdhrawing assets from the farm.

setCap(uint256).notice: set the deposit cap of the farm

setCore(address).notice: WARNING CALLING THIS FUNCTION CAN POTENTIALLY BRICK A CONTRACT IF CORE IS SET INCORRECTLYset new reference to core only callable by governor

setEnabledRouter(address,bool).notice: Allows governance to manage the whitelist of routers to be used by the keeper with FARM_SWAP_CALLER role.

setMaxSlippage(uint256).notice: set the max tolerated slippage for depositing and witdhrawing assets from the farm

withdraw(uint256,address).notice: withdraw an amount of the asset() from the farm

wrapToken().notice: Reference to the wrap token (to which assetTokens are swapped).

wrapTokenOracle().notice: Reference to an oracle for the wrap token (for wrapToken <-> assetToken exchange rates).
